description: Cross-session memory MCP server for AI coding assistants

stories.title: Project scaffolding
acceptance_criteria: package.json exists with name=cc-mem, bin, type=module, scripts (build/test)
tsconfig.json exists with strict mode, ES2022, Node16 module resolution
Dependencies installed: sql.js, @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, uuid, typescript, vitest
npm run build succeeds with zero errors

stories.title: Database connection + migrations
acceptance_criteria: src/db/database.ts: Database class with init/persist/close, handles corrupted files
src/db/migrations.ts: runMigrations creates sessions, observations, observations_fts (with triggers), user_prompts, schema_versions tables
All indexes created: idx_observations_project, idx_observations_session, idx_observations_created, idx_observations_type, idx_observations_status, idx_observations_hash, idx_sessions_project
Tests pass: __tests__/db/database.test.ts

stories.title: Sessions CRUD
acceptance_criteria: src/db/sessions.ts: SessionsRepo with create/getById/update/getLatestByProject
Tests pass: __tests__/db/sessions.test.ts

stories.title: Hash utility + Observations CRUD + dedup
acceptance_criteria: src/utils/hash.ts: contentHash returns consistent SHA256 hex
src/db/observations.ts: ObservationsRepo with create (returns 'created'|'duplicate')/getById/listByProject/listBySession/updateStatus/delete/listProjects
Dedup: same content_hash + session_id + within 30s → returns 'duplicate'
Tests pass: __tests__/utils/hash.test.ts, __tests__/db/observations.test.ts

stories.title: FTS5 search
acceptance_criteria: src/db/search.ts: SearchRepo.search(query, options) with project/type/status/since filters
Search uses JOIN on observations_fts and observations via rowid
Tests pass: __tests__/db/search.test.ts

stories.title: Project name detection
acceptance_criteria: src/utils/project.ts: detectProject(cwd, explicit?) returns git repo folder name or basename(cwd)
Tests pass: __tests__/utils/project.test.ts

stories.title: LLMProvider interface + ZhipuProvider
acceptance_criteria: src/llm/provider.ts: LLMProvider interface with extractObservation/summarizeSession
src/llm/providers/zhipu.ts: ZhipuProvider implements LLMProvider with API call, JSON parsing, markdown strip, cooldown
parseResponse handles: valid JSON, markdown-wrapped JSON, unparseable text
Consecutive 3 failures → 5-minute cooldown
Tests pass: __tests__/llm/zhipu.test.ts

stories.title: Context formatting utility
acceptance_criteria: src/utils/format.ts: formatContext produces compact markdown with type icons, timestamps, stats
Tests pass: __tests__/utils/format.test.ts

stories.title: MCP server + all tools + resources + prompts
acceptance_criteria: src/server.ts: createServer wires up McpServer with 7 tools + 2 resources + 1 prompt
7 tools registered: add_observation, search, get_context, summarize, review_observation, list_projects, delete_observation
2 resources: cc-mem://context/{project}, cc-mem://session/{session_id}
1 prompt: cc-mem://prompts/usage-guide
npm run build succeeds with zero errors

stories.title: CLI entry point
acceptance_criteria: src/index.ts: reads env vars, inits Database, creates ZhipuProvider, starts stdio transport
Supports CC_MEM_DB_PATH, CC_MEM_ZHIPU_API_KEY, CC_MEM_ZHIPU_MODEL env vars
npm run build succeeds

stories.title: Integration test
acceptance_criteria: __tests__/tools/integration.test.ts exercises: create session → add observation → search → get_context → summarize → list_projects → delete
Full test suite passes: npm test

stories.title: README + gitignore + final polish
acceptance_criteria: README.md covers: what it is, install (npm i -g), config (env vars), MCP settings.json example, tools list
.gitignore covers: node_modules, dist, *.db, *.db.bak
npm run build && npm test both pass
